message:
🌱 Add sops: Adding support for ssh keys for encryption mission (#838)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "sops-692-adding-support-for-ssh-keys-for-encryption",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "sops: Adding support for ssh keys for encryption.",
+    "description": "Adding support for ssh keys for encryption.. Requested by 36+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current sops setup",
+        "description": "Verify your sops version and configuration:\n```bash\nsops --version\n```\nThis feature requires sops v3.7.0+ with age encryption support."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review sops configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant sops configuration:\nSSH keys could be also used for encryption. They are already in well-known locations i.e. `/etc/ssh/ssh_host_rsa_key`. Most developer/servers have already ssh keys."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Adding support for ssh keys for encryption.",
+        "description": "The fix adds age encryption support to sops as an alternative to PGP/KMS.\n\nSetup and usage:\n```bash\n# Generate an age key\nmkdir -p ~/.sops/age/\nage-keygen -o ~/.sops/age/keys.txt\n\n# Encrypt a file using the age public key\nsops --age age1hhpw5e07syc00jwtwxs64e6nqv9exhmmjrlztcxkw9vgnjqev47qllp3ry -e secret.yaml > secret.enc.yaml\n\n# Decrypt the file\nexport SOPS_AGE_KEY_FILE=~/.sops/age/keys.txt\nsops -d secret.enc.yaml\n```\n\nSee the fix PR for details: https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/688"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that age encryption works correctly:\n```bash\n# Create a test file\necho 'secret_key: my_secret_value' > /tmp/test-secret.yaml\n\n# Encrypt with age\nsops --age <your-age-public-key> -e /tmp/test-secret.yaml > /tmp/test-secret.enc.yaml\n\n# Decrypt and verify\nsops -d /tmp/test-secret.enc.yaml\n```\nConfirm the encrypted file can be round-tripped successfully."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Implements support for [age](https://age-encryption.org/) as I requested in #603. I'm not a Go programmer and was learning the sops code as I went, so there's likely a lot I missed here. But the basic encrypt and decrypt operations are working for me! I used #569 as a reference for how to do this, as suggested by .\n\nExample (this has been simplified in more recent commits.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# Generate an age key\nmkdir -p ~/.sops/age/\nage-keygen -o ~/.sops/age/keys.txt\n\n# Encrypt a file\nsops --age <age-public-key> -e secret.yaml > secret.enc.yaml\n\n# Decrypt\nexport SOPS_AGE_KEY_FILE=~/.sops/age/keys.txt\nsops -d secret.enc.yaml"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "sops",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "sops"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/getsops/sops/issues/692",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/getsops/sops",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/688"
+    },
+    "reactions": 36,
+    "comments": 8,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "sops"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working sops installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:43:57.473Z",

+    "sanitized": true,

+  }
+}
